top_signals.title: Vedanta Eyes $372 Million Raise From Zambia Copper Mines IPO
top_signals.summary: Vedanta Resources Ltd. plans to sell an 11.9% stake in a US-based unit to raise about $372 million to develop its Zambian copper mining complex.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AI Agents and the Unseen Work of War
top_signals.summary:
Armies run on more than what happens at the front. Behind every operation is a vast amount of coordination, administration, logistics, and judgment. Bill Pessin, senior vice president of national security at Salesforce and a former U.S. Army logistics officer, joins Jonathan to discuss how military organizations can use AI agents, what makes these tools different from ordinary software, and why safety and accountability matter when new technology enters national security work. They also discuss what Pessin learned early in his Army career about the gap between plans, systems, and the people who have to make them work. Image: Petty

The post AI Agents and the Unseen Work of War appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Diesel Prices Fall Under $5, Easing Inflationary Pressure
top_signals.summary: The cost of diesel in the US fell below $5 a gallon for the first time since mid-March, offering some relief for one of the global economy’s most important fuels.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
